name: FiiO FX17
description: The FiiO FX17 is a flagship tribrid In-Ear Monitor (IEM) featuring 13 drivers per side. It utilizes a 10mm lithium-magnesium dynamic driver for bass, 4 custom Knowles balanced armatures for mids/highs, and 8 Sonion electrostatic drivers for ultra-highs. It also includes interchangeable plugs and a specialized DSP USB-C cable.

name: FiiO M23
description: The FiiO M23 is a high-resolution portable digital audio player featuring a snappy Snapdragon 660 processor and an advanced AKM DAC setup. Its standout feature is a "Desktop Mode" that dramatically boosts output power to 1000mW when connected to an external fast charger.

specs.value: Android 12, Snapdragon 660 SoC, 4GB RAM, 64GB ROM (expandable via MicroSD up to 2TB)
5500mAh; up to 10.5 hours (3.5mm) or 9 hours (4.4mm) of playback; supports 30W QC4.0/PD fast charging

name: Swan D100
description: The HiVi-Swans D100 are compact, 2-way active Bluetooth bookshelf speakers. Known for delivering high-fidelity audio, they feature a signature isodynamic ribbon tweeter and are ideal for desktops, TVs, and near-field listening

name: Topping DX5II
description: The Topping DX5 II is a high-performance, fully balanced desktop DAC and headphone amplifier. Powered by dual ES9039Q2M DAC chips and an X-Hybrid amp circuit, it delivers exceptional output (up to 7.6W × 2) and features 10-band PEQ

specs.value: PCM up to 32bit/768kHz, DSD512, and full MQA hardware decoding
